name: coding
description: Build test-first changes, create agent containers, and bootstrap Playprint with focused workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Test-first development, agent containers, and Playprint setup.
interface.longDescription: Focused workflows for test-first changes, reliable Docker images for agent runtimes, and explicitly bootstrapping a pinned Playprint workspace.
defaultPrompt: Use $agent-containers to create or review this agent Docker image.
Use $playprint-bootstrap to initialize Playprint in this Host Game Repository.
